text:
Once upon an earwig, there lived a cheerful hedgehog.

His name was Spiny Owl.

He loved collecting shiny little stones.

So one day he took a trip through the dewforest.

There he saw a glittering sapphire.

It was beautiful!

Spiny Owl snatched it up.

Oh dear!

It was much too big.

He rolled it around

and made an owl necklace.

Oh!

They sparkled like raindrops!

They were so beautiful.

Spiny Owl strutted home proud.

He wore his sapphire.

But then?

They fell apart.

Oh?


He loved them still.

They just weren.

That was silly.

Maybe just.

That night?

They flew away.

To sparkle elsewhere.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
